title: League of Legends Analysis
description: Utilized advanced statistical techniques to analyze factors contributing to victory in professional League of Legends matches. Implemented linear regression, decision trees, and random forest models. Performed cross-validation and hyperparameter tuning to increase prediction accuracy from 77% to 84%. Designed and published a comprehensive web-based visualization of analytical findings.

title: Music Genre Classifier
description: Engineered over 1 million MIDI data entries from the Lakh dataset to train genre classification models. Conducted comprehensive preprocessing, including oversampling, one-hot encoding, label encoding, imputation, and scaling. Implemented support vector machine, decision tree classifier, and KNN models. Achieved 63% accuracy after model tuning and cross-validation.

title: Parkinson's Disease Typing Demonstration
description: Built an interactive website that visualizes how Parkinson's medication affects typing behavior using real-world keystroke data. Implemented D3.js visualizations and animations for medicated vs. unmedicated typing latency and accuracy. Designed and styled a responsive front-end interface highlighting medication effects and data-driven insights.

title: LoL Regional Playstyle Analysis
description: Conducted comparative analysis of Eastern vs. Western League of Legends professional teams. Engineered features to quantify regional playstyle differences (e.g., jungle proximity, early-game aggression). Trained machine learning models (Logistic Regression, Random Forest) to classify team regions with up to 85% accuracy. Authored a 5-page research report highlighting statistical trends and strategic preferences.

title: LLM Eval Systems Framework
description: A modular framework for evaluating large language model outputs using custom judge metrics, automated test suites, and comparative analysis across multiple model providers.
